item.title:
BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 21min Is it going to the wire?
The Glens face leaders Larne on Friday night in a huge game l
item.description:
BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 21min Is it going to the wire?
The Glens face leaders Larne on Friday night in a huge game live on BBC iPlayer and the BBC Sport website, knowing a win would move them level on points with the Inver Reds before the last game of the season.
#BBCFootball #BBCIrishPrem 1 4 736

item.title: BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 20min En respuesta a @BBCSPORTNI 'We've given ourselves a chance' - Hoban on title hopes De

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 41min ROUND-UP: There were wins in the Dalata Hotel Goup Munster U20 Football Championship this e
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 41min ROUND-UP: There were wins in the Dalata Hotel Goup Munster U20 Football Championship this evening for @OfficialCorkGAA and @WaterfordGAA . #GAABelong De gaa.ie 3 8 5 mil
